channel.title: Journal of Complementary and Integrative Medicine
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Journal of Complementary and Integrative Medicine

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Alla Philippova, Raisa Aringazina, Roberto Lozano, Yuliya Tikhonova DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jcim-2025-frontmatter1

item.title: Terpene-based novel invasomes: pioneering cancer treatment strategies in traditional medicine
item.description: Article by Alla Philippova, Raisa Aringazina, Roberto Lozano, Yuliya Tikhonova DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jcim-2024-0131

item.title: Mind-body practices for people living with dementia and their family carers: a systematic review
item.description: Article by Alla Philippova, Raisa Aringazina, Roberto Lozano, Yuliya Tikhonova DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jcim-2024-0142

item.title: Methodological advances in formulation and assay of herbal resources-based topical drug delivery systems
item.description: Article by Alla Philippova, Raisa Aringazina, Roberto Lozano, Yuliya Tikhonova DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jcim-2024-0181

item.title: A potential therapeutic role of resveratrol in mitigating hepatotoxicity induced by paracetamol and alcohol
item.description: Article by Alla Philippova, Raisa Aringazina, Roberto Lozano, Yuliya Tikhonova DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jcim-2024-0380

item.title: A preclinical study on effect of betanin on sodium fluoride induced hepatorenal toxicity in Wistar rats
item.description: Article by Alla Philippova, Raisa Aringazina, Roberto Lozano, Yuliya Tikhonova DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jcim-2024-0262

item.title: Phytochemical characterization and evaluation of the biological activity spectrum of ethanolic fruit extract of Garcinia indica: a less explored plant of Ayurveda
item.description: Article by Alla Philippova, Raisa Aringazina, Roberto Lozano, Yuliya Tikhonova DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jcim-2024-0234

item.title: Scientific investigation on antibacterial, antioxidant, cytotoxic effects and TLC bioautography of Terminalia schimperiania stem bark extracts
item.description: Article by Alla Philippova, Raisa Aringazina, Roberto Lozano, Yuliya Tikhonova DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jcim-2024-0251

item.title: Albizia ferruginea (Guill. & Perr.) Benth. leaf abates deregulation of P53, IRS, HsD17β2, FTO, and CYP11a genes in polycystic ovarian syndrome rat
item.description: Article by Alla Philippova, Raisa Aringazina, Roberto Lozano, Yuliya Tikhonova DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jcim-2024-0287

item.title: Vernonia amygdalina aqueous leaf extract modulates metformin pharmacokinetics, inhibits CYP3A4 and CYP2C9 enzymes in streptozotocin-induced diabetic rats
item.description: Article by Alla Philippova, Raisa Aringazina, Roberto Lozano, Yuliya Tikhonova DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jcim-2024-0217

item.title: Quantitative determination of the antibacterial activity of licorice (Glycyrrhiza glabra) and tetracycline gel against Aggregatibacter actinomycetemcomitans (Aa), Porphyromonas gingivalis (Pg) and Prevotella intermedia (Pi) – a microbiological in vitro study
item.description: Article by Alla Philippova, Raisa Aringazina, Roberto Lozano, Yuliya Tikhonova DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jcim-2024-0183

item.title: In-silico screening of bioactive compounds of Moringa oleifera as potential inhibitors targeting HIF-1α/VEGF/GLUT-1 pathway against breast cancer
item.description: Article by Alla Philippova, Raisa Aringazina, Roberto Lozano, Yuliya Tikhonova DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jcim-2024-0176

item.title: Isolation, structural characterization, and molecular docking studies on the bioactive compound from n-Hexane extract of Emilia sonchifolia (L.) DC against the pancreatic cancer target Aurora 2 Kinase
item.description: Article by Alla Philippova, Raisa Aringazina, Roberto Lozano, Yuliya Tikhonova DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jcim-2024-0290

item.title: The impact of Omega-3 supplementation on arrhythmia reduction in acute coronary syndrome patients: a randomized clinical trial
item.description: Article by Alla Philippova, Raisa Aringazina, Roberto Lozano, Yuliya Tikhonova DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jcim-2024-0427

item.title: Evaluation of gastric tolerability for long-term use of diclofenac and celecoxib in male albino rats and potential gastroprotective benefits of royal jelly: a randomized controlled trial
item.description: Article by Alla Philippova, Raisa Aringazina, Roberto Lozano, Yuliya Tikhonova DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jcim-2024-0324

item.title: The efficacy of thread embedding acupuncture on pain score, neck disability index, and pressure pain threshold for myofascial pain therapy in the upper trapezius muscle
item.description: Article by Alla Philippova, Raisa Aringazina, Roberto Lozano, Yuliya Tikhonova DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jcim-2024-0132

item.title: Correction of hypoxic effects on target organs in pneumonia with phytotherapy
item.description: Article by Alla Philippova, Raisa Aringazina, Roberto Lozano, Yuliya Tikhonova DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jcim-2024-0214
